text: Alice, hi team, let's review today's sprint status and release plan. Bob, I finished the API integration yesterday, but I am not convinced the testing timeline is realistic. Alice, great update. I will send the final report by Friday and share it with everyone. Bob, okay, I will prepare the test plan tonight, and we can move the QA deadline to Monday.
